summary: Applied a surgical exit-seam polish to strengthen the handoff into Chapter 12's storage-unit scene while preserving all chapter beats, voice, and causal structure.
edits: Adjusted Ina's final line to tighten spoken cadence without changing intent ("I'm going north. I don't know when I'm back.").
Reworked the closing sentence to include northbound transit and keyring-palm pressure, creating a cleaner bridge into Chapter 12's keyring/awning opening image.
